document.title: Small Business Lending Under the Equal Credit Opportunity Act (Regulation B)
document.summary: The CFPB is revising Regulation B, subpart B to amend coverage of credit transactions and financial institutions, redefine small business criteria, modify data collection requirements, and adjust compliance dates for Section 1071 small business lending data reporting.

issues: Effective date not found in metadata

effective_dates.action: Final rule implementing section 1071 by adding subpart B to Regulation B became effective
effective_dates.who: all financial institutions subject to Regulation B

effective_dates.consequence: rule takes effect and institutions must begin compliance preparations

compliance_dates.action: Interim final rule published extending compliance dates for data collection and reporting on small business lending
compliance_dates.who: financial institutions preparing to comply with section 1071
compliance_dates.consequence: Extended compliance deadlines for certain market participants per court orders
institutions must be in full compliance with all requirements; failure to comply may result in enforcement action

deadlines.action: Submit comments on 2025 proposed rule to amend 2023 final rule
deadlines.consequence: Comments submitted after this date may not be considered in rulemaking

publication_dates.action: Interim final rule published with further amendments to Regulation B, subpart B
publication_dates.who: all financial institutions subject to small business lending requirements
publication_dates.consequence: Additional amendments to coverage, definitions, data points, and compliance dates became effective

publication_dates.action: final rule published in Federal Register confirming 2025 interim final rule findings
publication_dates.consequence: establishes final compliance framework with no further substantive changes

publication_dates.action: CFPB published 2025 proposed rule in Federal Register
publication_dates.consequence: Initiated comment period for proposed amendments
